synopsis: Princess Leia Organa travels to the factory planet Metalorn on a mission to spread a message of hope to its residents. The world is completely controlled by the Galactic Empire under Governor Corwyth, with no word of the Rebellion reaching its citizens. Leia evades Imperial stormtroopers long enough to contact her former instructor Arn Horada, hoping he will spread word that the Rebel Alliance is actively opposing the Empire's tyranny. She is soon confronted by Baron Orman Tagge before she can establish any details, but manages to escape with the help of a youngster named Tammi.
title: Star Wars (1977) #30: A Princess Alone
